title: Meta’s glasses will turn off the camera if you tamper with the privacy light
summary: Meta announced a camera-disabling feature for its smart glasses that activates when the privacy LED light is tampered with or destroyed, addressing modders who have found workarounds. The update aims to strengthen privacy protection against deliberate circumvention.
content:
Even so, the privacy LED light is still hard to see. It’s on in this photo. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Amid public backlash over its smart glasses, Meta announced that it will be updating its glasses with a new feature that will disable the camera when it detects that someone has tampered with or destroyed the glasses' privacy LED light. The update is meant to address modders who have taken actions such as physically drilling into the LED light.
Meta has previously tried to discourage tampering with the LED light. For example, starting with its second generation glasses, blocking the light with tape or other objects will trigger a prompt asking users to uncover the recording light. However, many modders have found various workarounds for tha …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta智能眼镜在隐私灯被篡改时将关闭摄像头
zh.summary: Meta宣布为其智能眼镜推出摄像头禁用功能，当隐私LED灯被篡改或破坏时激活，以应对发现变通方法的改装者。该更新旨在加强对故意规避的隐私保护。

title: Final extension: Startup Battlefield Australia applications now close July 20
summary: Startup Battlefield Australia, an accelerator program for ambitious founders, is extending its application deadline to July 20, offering a fast track to investors and mentors.
content: If you're building something ambitious, this is a fast track to the people who can move your startup forward.

zh.title: 最终延期：Battlefield Australia创业计划申请截止日期延至7月20日
zh.summary: Battlefield Australia是面向雄心勃勃创始人的加速器项目，现已将申请截止日期延长至7月20日，为申请者提供快速接近投资者和导师的机会。

title: Michigan sees explosive outbreak of diarrheal parasite with over 700 cases
summary: Michigan is experiencing a rapid outbreak of diarrheal parasite infections with over 700 confirmed cases as health officials work to identify the common source.
content: Cases have risen quickly as officials are working to identify a common source.

zh.title: 密歇根州腹泻寄生虫爆发，病例超过700例
zh.summary: 密歇根州正经历腹泻寄生虫感染的快速爆发，已确认超过700例病例，卫生官员正在努力查找共同传染源。

title: Meta just launched a new AI generator, Muse Image, and users are already pushing back over use of their photos
summary: Meta launched Muse Image, a new AI image generation model, sparking user backlash over concerns that the generator could use Instagram users' photos without proper consent or compensation.
content: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising, decorating and creator-based opportunities.

zh.title: Meta推出新AI图像生成器Muse Image，用户因照片使用问题强烈反对
zh.summary: Meta推出了新的AI图像生成模型Muse Image，引发用户强烈反对。用户担忧该生成器可能在未经适当同意或补偿的情况下使用Instagram用户的照片。

title: Of course viewers are giving up on Netflix shows
summary: Netflix is losing viewers after first seasons of popular shows, with some series like Beef losing 70 percent of their audience upon return. The company is investigating causes behind declining series retention rates.
content:
Even though Netflix is the world's most popular paid streaming service, the company has been struggling to keep viewers watching its series after their first seasons. Beef - the streamer's anthology about people locked in feuds - lost 70 percent of its viewership when it returned earlier this year. There seems to be some confusion as to why people aren't champing at the bit to dive back into once-popular projects like the live-action adaptations of Avatar: The Last Airbender and One Piece. Netflix is reportedly hard at work trying to figure out what, exactly, is prompting subscribers to jump ship in droves. But if you've spent any time payin …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 观众当然正在放弃Netflix节目
zh.summary: Netflix在热门节目首季结束后正在失去观众。部分剧集如《Beef》在回归时失去了70%的观众。公司正在调查导致系列保留率下降的原因。

title: Netflix is about to host videos from BuzzFeed, Condé Nast, and other publishers
summary: Beginning August 3, Netflix will stream licensed and original content from major publishers including BuzzFeed, Condé Nast, Hearst, and Tastemade, consolidating diverse internet media on a single platform.
content:
Starting on August 3rd, Netflix's streaming library will include video content from dozens of digital media brands including BuzzFeed, Condé Nast, Hearst Magazines, People Inc, and Tastemade. As reported earlier by TechCrunch, the deal includes a mix of licensed past videos and new ongoing series that would have typically been published on YouTube or other online platforms, like Architectural Digest's "Open Door" or Vanity Fair's "Lie Detector Test."  
As Netflix puts it, the deal will allow subscribers to watch content "from around the Internet without having to leave Netflix." The announcement follows a Bloomberg report earlier this week  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix即将上线BuzzFeed、Condé Nast等出版商的视频内容
zh.summary: 从8月3日起，Netflix将流媒体播放来自BuzzFeed、Condé Nast、Hearst和Tastemade等主要出版商的授权和原创内容，将多样化的互联网媒体整合在单一平台上。

title: Data centers’ energy demand threatens Trump’s “Made in America” plan
summary: Rising energy demand from AI data centers is straining electricity supply in the Rust Belt, threatening to undermine the Trump administration's 'Made in America' manufacturing agenda.
content: Squeeze on Rust Belt electricity bills threatens Trump’s manufacturing plan.

zh.title: 数据中心的能源需求威胁特朗普的"美国制造"计划
zh.summary: 人工智能数据中心不断上升的能源需求正在对美国锈带地区的电力供应造成压力，威胁着特朗普政府的"美国制造"制造业议程。

title: Surprisingly large number of people may have marker for tick-linked meat allergy
summary: New research suggests a surprisingly large portion of the population may carry markers for alpha-gal syndrome, a tick-transmitted meat allergy, though many questions remain about how the condition develops.
content: There's still a slew of questions about why some people develop alpha-gal syndrome.

zh.title: 令人惊讶的大量人群可能携带蜱虫相关肉类过敏症标志物
zh.summary: 新研究表明，人口中出乎意料的大部分人可能携带α-gal综合征的标志物，这是一种蜱虫传播的肉类过敏症，但关于该疾病如何发展仍存在许多疑问。

title: Meta’s new Muse Image model can pull other Instagram users into AI photos
summary: Meta's Muse Image AI model, launched by its Superintelligence Labs, can incorporate other Instagram users' likenesses into generated images and is rolling out across Meta's platforms including Instagram and WhatsApp.
content:
Meta is launching the first AI image generation model made by its Superintelligence Labs division. The Muse Image model now powers the image-making tools across the Meta AI app, Instagram, and WhatsApp, and it's coming soon to Facebook and Messenger, according to an announcement on Tuesday.
It's part of the growing Muse family of AI models that replace Meta's Llama lineup. Alexandr Wang, who Meta hired to head up its Superintelligence Labs last year, says on Threads that Muse Image is "agentic," meaning it works with its Muse Spark large language model "to reason through your prompt, search the web, and plan before it generates." Meta is al …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta新型Muse Image模型可将其他Instagram用户融入AI生成的照片
zh.summary: Meta的Muse Image AI模型由其超级智能实验室推出，可以将其他Instagram用户的形象融入生成的图像中，目前正在Instagram和WhatsApp等Meta平台上推出。

title: SCOTUS lets Texas enforce app store law that Big Tech calls "censorship regime"
summary: The Supreme Court allowed Texas's controversial app store law requiring age verification to remain in effect, dismissing Big Tech's claims that it constitutes a 'censorship regime.'
content: Texas win at 5th Circuit left in place as attempts to overturn age law continue.

zh.title: 美国最高法院允许德州执行应用商店年龄验证法,被科技巨头称为"审查制度"
zh.summary: 美国最高法院允许德州有争议的应用商店法保持有效,该法要求进行年龄验证,驳回了科技巨头声称其构成"审查制度"的指控。

title: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
summary: Open source AI models are gaining market traction without damaging Anthropic or other frontier AI labs, as each appears to occupy different phases in the AI product lifecycle.
content: Open source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.

zh.title: 开源AI的兴起为何目前还未对Anthropic造成伤害
zh.summary: 开源AI模型正在获得市场关注,但并未对Anthropic或其他前沿AI实验室造成损害,因为各方似乎分别处于AI产品生命周期的不同阶段。

title: Microsoft joins AI cost-cutting trend by relying more on its own models
summary: Microsoft is joining other major tech companies in reducing AI costs by increasingly relying on its own internally developed models rather than third-party alternatives.
content: Microsoft is the latest Silicon Valley giant to cut back on its AI spending.

zh.title: 微软加入AI成本削减潮流,更多依赖自有模型
zh.summary: 微软正与其他科技巨头一起通过越来越多地依赖内部开发的模型而非第三方方案来降低AI成本。

title: Bethesda, id Software reportedly hit hard by Microsoft layoffs
summary: Microsoft layoffs hit Xbox studios hard, with id Software and Bethesda among the affected companies, with some teams losing as much as 50 percent of their staff and more cuts potentially coming.
content: As much as 50 percent of some teams affected by reductions, and more could be coming.

zh.title: Bethesda和id Software据报在微软裁员中遭重创
zh.summary: 微软裁员对Xbox工作室造成严重打击，id Software和Bethesda等公司受到影响，部分团队裁员幅度达50%，可能还会有进一步裁员。

title: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
summary: Discord's AI moderation system incorrectly banned users for harmless images, affecting accounts since May with 200 additional users banned before the company fixed the issue. The incident highlights risks of automated content moderation and its impact on user accounts.
content: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem.

zh.title: Discord承认AI审核错误导致用户因无害图片被禁用账户
zh.summary: Discord的AI审核系统错误地禁止了因无害图片被标记的用户账户，自5月起受影响，在公司修复问题前又有200个用户被误禁。该事件突显了自动化内容审核的风险及其对用户账户的影响。

title: Google's Pixel 11 launch event is set for August 12, with possible price increases
summary: Google will launch the Pixel 11 on August 12, with leaks suggesting the devices may include glowing LEDs and higher prices than previous generations. The price increase marks a notable shift in Google's phone strategy and consumer positioning.
content: Google's new phones could feature glowing LEDs and higher price tags.

zh.title: Google Pixel 11发布会定于8月12日，可能涨价
zh.summary: Google将于8月12日推出Pixel 11，泄露信息表明新设备可能配备发光LED，价格可能高于前代产品。这次涨价标志着Google手机策略和消费者定位的显著转变。

title: Google’s Pixel event is set for August 12
summary: Google has scheduled its next Pixel device launch event for August 12. The event will introduce new Pixel hardware to the market.
content: Google's upcoming event in August will introduce new Pixel devices.

zh.title: Google Pixel发布会定于8月12日
zh.summary: Google已为其下一代Pixel设备发布会安排了8月12日举行。该活动将向市场推出新的Pixel硬件产品。

title: Figma acquires team behind a vibe-coding app
summary: Figma has acquired the team behind a Y Combinator-backed vibe-coding platform that evolved into an agent-creation product. The acquisition reflects Figma's interest in expanding AI-assisted development tools within its design ecosystem.
content: The Y Combinator-backed company started a vibe-coding platform and later built an agent-creation product.

zh.title: Figma收购Vibe编码应用团队
zh.summary: Figma已收购Y Combinator支持的vibe编码平台背后的团队，该平台已演变成代理创建产品。此次收购反映了Figma对在其设计生态系统中扩展AI辅助开发工具的兴趣。

title: The Weather Channel increases streaming subscription prices by up to $20
summary: The Weather Channel has raised streaming subscription prices, with basic access starting at $5 monthly and potential increases up to $20. The price hike reflects broader subscription cost increases across the media industry.
content: Livestreaming the channel through its app now starts at $5 per month.

zh.title: Weather Channel将流媒体订阅价格上调至高达20美元
zh.summary: Weather Channel已提高流媒体订阅价格，基本访问权限起价为每月5美元，可能增加至20美元。价格上调反映了整个媒体行业更广泛的订阅成本增加。

title: X says top accounts steal videos from other users as it announces new video tools
summary: X acknowledged that top accounts frequently repost videos stolen from other creators, sometimes years after original upload, with such content driving nearly half of platform impressions. The platform launched new in-app video editing and recording tools to encourage original content creation.
content:
Nikita Bier, X's head of product, said in a post on Monday that "[m]any videos from top accounts are simply stolen from other users, sometimes 5 years after they originally went viral," while noting that videos on the platform "make up close to half the impressions on X." According to Bier, X is launching a new in-app video editor and recorder to address this "recycled content," so that "some videos on X can finally be original content that doesn't exist on other platforms."
As previously reported by TechCrunch, the new video tools are available now on X's iOS app, and include an option for overlaying captions in multiple languages and a "g …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: X称顶级账户从其他用户窃取视频，同时宣布推出新视频工具
zh.summary: X承认顶级账户经常转发从其他创作者盗取的视频，有时在原始上传数年后才转发，此类内容驱动了平台近一半的浏览量。该平台推出了新的应用内视频编辑和录制工具，以鼓励原创内容创作。

title: The Nintendo Switch's days are numbered—but what is that number?
summary: Despite being nine years old, analysis suggests the Nintendo Switch could continue selling for several more years before discontinuation. The console's longevity reflects strong consumer attachment and an extended product lifecycle.
content: Ars analysis suggests the 9-year-old console could keep selling for years.

zh.title: 任天堂Switch的日子屈指可数——但具体是多少呢？
zh.summary: 尽管已有九年历史，分析表明任天堂Switch在停产前可能继续销售数年。该游戏机的持久生命力反映了消费者的强烈认同感和延长的产品生命周期。

title: The ‘G-Wagen of golf carts’ could be the ideal second car
summary: Lisbon-based startup Amble unveiled a premium, street-legal electric buggy with neo-retro design that prioritizes simplicity and downsizing over performance. The Amble One targets urban users in constrained locations where traditional cars are impractical.
content:
While the auto industry wrings its hands over the electric vehicle market, sweating details like aerodynamic efficiency and range anxiety, a new EV startup based in Lisbon, Portugal, is zagging in a different direction. Amble's new electric buggy won't impress anyone with its 0-60 time or its self-driving features (it has none). Instead, it takes a stab at the belief that cars have gotten too big, too fast, and perhaps could use a bit of a downgrade in both departments.
The Amble One is a premium, street-legal buggy with a gorgeous neo-retro design that's currently being marketed to locations where traditional cars are unnecessary or too la …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: "高尔夫球车中的G-Wagen"可能是理想的第二辆车
zh.summary: 总部位于里斯本的初创公司Amble推出了一款高端、合法上路的电动车，采用新复古设计，优先考虑简约和小型化而非性能。Amble One针对的是那些传统汽车不切实际的受限城市地区的用户。

title: ABC tells the government to get out of its newsrooms
summary: ABC pushed back against the FCC's investigation into The View's coverage of political candidates, arguing the scrutiny threatens editorial independence. The dispute highlights tensions between government oversight and press freedom in political programming.
content:
ABC is firing back at the Federal Communications Commission after the agency opened an investigation into The View's airtime of political candidates. In a letter to the FCC on Tuesday, ABC argues that the agency's actions pose a risk to editorial independence by targeting programs "perceived as unfriendly to the current administration," as reported earlier by The Wrap.
In February, the FCC Chair Brendan Carr confirmed that he's reexamining The View's classification as a "bona fide" news program after the talk show held an interview with Rep. James Talarico (D-TX), who is running for a spot in the Senate. The View's classification exempts it …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ABC要求政府不要干涉其新闻编辑室
zh.summary: ABC反抗FCC对《观点》节目政治候选人报道的调查，主张这种审查威胁编辑独立性。这一争端突显了政府监管与政治节目新闻自由之间的紧张关系。

title: Anthropic is launching Claude Cowork on mobile and web
summary: Anthropic expanded Claude Cowork beyond desktop to mobile (iOS/Android) and web, rolling out first to Max subscribers. The expansion enables users to start tasks on one device and continue them on another without keeping their laptop open.
content:
Starting Tuesday, Anthropic's Claude Cowork AI platform will be available on mobile and web for the first time. The expanded access is rolling out first to Max subscribers and coming to Claude users on other plans "in the coming weeks." 
Claude Cowork was previously only accessible through the Claude desktop app for macOS and Windows, but now users on iOS and Android can also use it. However, Anthropic says the "full experience" for Cowork will still be on the desktop app, including features like local file access. 
Cowork sessions will also now run in the cloud by default, so you can continue them across different devices or run Cowork ta …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic 在移动端和网页推出 Claude Cowork
zh.summary: Anthropic 将 Claude Cowork 从桌面扩展到移动设备(iOS/Android)和网页，首先向 Max 订阅用户推出。这一扩展使用户能够在一台设备上启动任务，并在另一台设备上继续，而无需保持笔记本电脑开启。

title: Netflix dabbles in shorter video content with its new set of publisher deals with Variety, others
summary: Netflix is diversifying content by adding 2- to 20-minute videos from major publishers like Variety and Rolling Stone through new partnership deals. The move experiments with short-form content as Netflix seeks engagement beyond traditional feature-length programming.
content: Netflix is bringing 2- to 20-minute videos to its platform through new partnerships with digital publishers, including Rolling Stone and Variety.

zh.title: Netflix 通过与 Variety 等发行商的新合作协议尝试较短视频内容
zh.summary: Netflix 通过与 Variety 和 Rolling Stone 等主要发行商的新伙伴关系协议增加 2 至 20 分钟的视频内容来实现内容多样化。此举是 Netflix 在寻求超越传统长篇幅节目的参与度而进行的短视频内容实验。

title: Google announces Pixel 11 launch event in August
summary: Google officially announced its Pixel 11 launch event for August 12 at 6 PM ET in New York City, with teaser imagery suggesting gold color variants. Leaked specs indicate slimmer bezels and improved form factors compared to Pixel 10 models.
content:
Google is hosting its next Made by Google launch event for Pixel hardware on August 12th in New York City, according to an invitation sent by Google to The Verge. Unusually, the event is taking place in the evening: It'll kick off at 6PM ET that day. 
The email also includes a brief animation teasing what appears to be a phone in the Pixel 11 family that's gold. Pixel 11 leaks that have popped up so far show that the base phone could have slimmer bezels than the Pixel 10 and a solid black camera bar. Leaks of Pixel 11 Pro indicate the phone could be a touch thinner than the Pixel 10 Pro. And the Pixel 11 Pro Fold could also be thinner than  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google 宣布 Pixel 11 八月发布会
zh.summary: Google 正式宣布 Pixel 11 发布会将于 8 月 12 日美国东部时间下午 6 点在纽约市举行，预告图像暗示有金色色调变体。泄露的规格表明与 Pixel 10 型号相比，边框更窄且外形设计得到改进。

title: This race car is made from plant fibers, volcanoes, ... and seawater?
summary: The T70S racing vehicle uses unconventional sustainable materials including plant fibers, volcanic compounds, and seawater-derived components. The car can be configured for competitive racing or as road-legal street vehicles.
content: The T70S can be eligible for racing events or built to be road-legal.

zh.title: 这款赛车由植物纤维、火山物质和海水制成？
zh.summary: T70S赛车采用非常规的可持续材料，包括植物纤维、火山化合物和海水衍生成分。该车可配置为竞速赛车或符合法律规定的街道车。

title: Hacked, leaked, and held for ransom: The worst breaches of 2026 so far
summary: TechCrunch chronicles 2026's most damaging security breaches, including a massive DOGE data breach, compromises of critical energy and water infrastructure, and an FBI surveillance system hack. The incidents underscore escalating cybersecurity threats across government and critical infrastructure.
content: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.

zh.title: 被黑客入侵、泄露和勒索：2026年迄今为止最严重的数据泄露事件
zh.summary: TechCrunch记录了2026年最具破坏性的安全漏洞，包括大规模DOGE数据泄露、关键能源和水基础设施的威胁以及FBI监控系统黑客入侵。这些事件凸显了政府和关键基础设施面临的日益升级的网络安全威胁。

title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web
summary: Claude Cowork now runs on mobile and web platforms, allowing users to start tasks on one device and continue work across devices. The expansion increases accessibility and workflow flexibility for Anthropic's collaborative AI platform.
content: With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.

zh.title: Claude Cowork扩展到移动和网络平台
zh.summary: Claude Cowork现在可在移动和网络平台上运行，允许用户在一个设备上开始任务并在多个设备间继续工作。该扩展提高了Anthropic协作AI平台的可访问性和工作流灵活性。

title: Facing US export controls, China's DeepSeek plans to make its own chips
summary: Facing US export restrictions on advanced chips, Chinese AI company DeepSeek is developing its own semiconductor technology to reduce reliance on Nvidia and other international suppliers.
content: It's early, but the plan is to reduce dependency on Nvidia and Huawei.

zh.title: 面对美国出口管制，中国DeepSeek计划自主研发芯片
zh.summary: 中国AI公司DeepSeek在面临美国先进芯片出口限制的压力下，正在开发自主半导体技术，以减少对英伟达等国际供应商的依赖。

title: Doom developer id reportedly cut in half as part of Xbox layoffs
summary: id Software has laid off approximately 50 percent of its staff, roughly 90 employees, as part of broader Xbox restructuring, with quality assurance hit particularly hard—the same day the studio released a major game expansion.
content:
As part of the mass layoffs hitting Xbox, Doom developer id Software has laid off around 50 percent of its staff, according to Game Developer. One source claimed to the publication that the cuts equate to more than 90 redundancies. Another source said that id's QA department was significantly impacted. The report was published the same day that id is releasing a major expansion for its latest Doom game.
A former id employee affected by the cuts, Michael Maynard, corroborated the figure in a LinkedIn post, saying that the layoffs affected "roughly" 50 percent of the company. "We created arguably THE BEST first person engine technology in the …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 据报《毁灭战士》开发商id在Xbox裁员中被裁减一半
zh.summary: id Software在Xbox重组中裁减了约50%的员工（大约90人），其中质量保证部门受打击最严重，这发生在该工作室发布重大游戏扩展包的同一天。

title: Dragonflies maneuver like fighter pilots
summary: Research shows that male dragonflies execute dramatic aerial combat maneuvers through relatively simple vision-based behavioral rules rather than complex calculations. Their flight dynamics reveal principles similar to those used in advanced fighter pilot maneuvering techniques.
content: Male dragonflies' dramatic aerial combat maneuvers emerge from relatively simple vision-based rules.

zh.title: 蜻蜓像战斗机飞行员一样进行机动飞行
zh.summary: 研究表明，雄性蜻蜓通过相对简单的基于视觉的行为规则而不是复杂的计算来执行戏剧性的空战机动。它们的飞行动力学揭示了与先进战斗机飞行员机动技术相似的原理。

title: X adds a video editor to encourage creators to post original content, not stolen reposts
summary: X has launched a new video editor and recorder tool for iOS featuring multilingual captions, green-screen effects, and other editing capabilities. The feature is designed to encourage creators to produce original content rather than repost stolen videos.
content: X is rolling out a new video editor and recorder for iOS with multilingual captions, green-screen effects, and other editing tools.

zh.title: X推出视频编辑器鼓励创作者发布原创内容而非盗版重发
zh.summary: X为iOS推出了一个新的视频编辑和录制工具，具有多语言字幕、绿屏效果和其他编辑功能。该功能旨在鼓励创作者制作原创内容，而不是转发盗版视频。

title: VC firm Chemistry is raising $500M for its second fund
summary: Chemistry Ventures, founded by former leaders from Bessemer, Index Ventures, and Andreessen Horowitz, is raising $500 million for its second investment fund. The firm represents a collaborative effort among three prominent venture capital organizations.
content: Chemistry Ventures, the VC firm launched by Bessemer, Index Ventures, and Andreessen Horowitz alums, is raising $500M for its second fund.

zh.title: 风险投资公司Chemistry为其第二只基金融资5亿美元
zh.summary: 由Bessemer、Index Ventures和Andreessen Horowitz的前领导者创办的Chemistry Ventures正在为其第二只投资基金融资5亿美元。该公司代表了三家知名风险投资机构的合作努力。

title: AI law startup Norm raises $120M, hits unicorn valuation
summary: AI law startup Norm has raised a $120 million Series C round led by Khosla Ventures, achieving a $1.2 billion valuation. The funding validates the growing market for AI-powered legal technology solutions.
content: AI law startup Norm has raised a $120 million Series C round led by Kholsa Ventures, valuing the startup at $1.2 billion.

zh.title: AI法律初创公司Norm融资1.2亿美元，达到独角兽估值
zh.summary: AI法律初创公司Norm在Khosla Ventures领投的C轮融资中融得1.2亿美元，估值达12亿美元。这笔融资验证了AI驱动的法律科技解决方案市场的增长潜力。

title: This startup pits dealerships against each other to bid on your used car
summary: Bidbus, a platform enabling dealerships to bid competitively on used cars, has raised $15 million in Series A funding led by Ibex Investors. The startup addresses the used car market by introducing auction mechanics between dealers.
content: Bidbus, which lets dealerships bid on used cars, has raised $15 million in a Series A round that was led by early-stage mobility fund Ibex Investors.

zh.title: 这家初创公司让经销商竞价您的二手车
zh.summary: Bidbus是一个让经销商竞价二手车的平台，已获得由Ibex Investors领投的1500万美元A轮融资。这家初创公司通过在经销商之间引入拍卖机制来解决二手车市场问题。

title: iRobot’s newest floor cleaner isn’t a robot
summary: iRobot has launched the Roomba Electro Plus, a $399 manual floor cleaner combining vacuuming, mopping, and disinfecting for hard floors, marking the company's first non-robotic product. The company simultaneously announced five new robot vacuum models with improved suction, smaller designs, and lower prices.
content:
The Roomba Electro Plus is iRobot’s first manually-operated floor cleaner. | Image: iRobot	

iRobot just announced its first ever non-robotic floor cleaner. The $399 Roomba Electro Plus is a 5-in-1 hard-floor cleaner that combines vacuuming, mopping, and disinfecting, but you have to operate it yourself. The company also announced updates to its line of Roomba robot vacuums, launching five new models with higher suction power, smaller footprints, and lower prices. These largely replace the line that arrived in 2025. 
Designed exclusively for hard floors, the new Electro Plus is similar to the new breed of manual wet-dry floor cleaners available from Dreame, Roborock, and others. iRobot's distinguishing feature is Electro's ability  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: iRobot最新款地板清洁器不是机器人
zh.summary: iRobot推出了价格为399美元的Roomba Electro Plus，这是一款结合了吸尘、拖地和消毒功能的手动地板清洁器，标志着该公司推出了首款非机器人产品。该公司同时推出了五款新型机器人吸尘器，具有更强的吸力、更小的尺寸和更低的价格。

title: Microsoft fixes storage-hogging Windows 11 folder
summary: Microsoft has patched a Windows 11 bug where the CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal file consumed excessive storage, with some users reporting files growing to 500GB. The fix was included in the optional June 2026 update to improve disk space usage.
content:
Microsoft is addressing a Windows 11 bug that caused a folder to take up several gigabytes of storage space. As spotted earlier by Windows Latest, Microsoft included the patch in its optional  June 2026 update (KB5095093), which "improves disk space usage for the CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal file."
The CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal file is installed on Windows 11 PCs by default, and is related to app permissions. Several users have had issues with this file over the past few months, with one person saying the file took up 500GB of storage on their device. Others have reported the file growing to similarly large amounts, ranging from 12GB …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软修复占用大量存储空间的Windows 11文件夹
zh.summary: 微软已修复Windows 11的一个错误，该错误导致CapabilityAccessManager.db-wal文件占用过多存储空间，一些用户报告文件增长到500GB。该修复已包含在可选的2026年6月更新中，以改善磁盘空间使用情况。

title: New virus catalog reveals which pathogens pose the greatest threat
summary: Researchers have created a comprehensive virus catalog that identifies which pathogens pose the greatest threat to human health and society. The database can help scientists predict the characteristics and pandemic potential of future dangerous viruses.
content: The data can help predict what a future pandemic virus might look like.

zh.title: 新病毒目录揭示哪些病原体构成最大威胁
zh.summary: 研究人员创建了一份全面的病毒目录，确定了哪些病原体对人类健康和社会构成最大威胁。该数据库可以帮助科学家预测未来危险病毒的特征和大流行潜力。

title: Hacktivists call out Trump by hacking and defacing US Army websites
summary: Hacktivists breached two U.S. Army websites and defaced them with messages calling President Trump derogatory names. The Army has since fixed the compromised websites.
content: The U.S. Army has fixed two of its websites that were hacked to display messages calling President Trump a "pedophile" and a "thief."

zh.title: 黑客激进分子通过黑客攻击和破坏美国陆军网站来呼吁特朗普
zh.summary: 黑客激进分子入侵了两个美国陆军网站，并用谩骂特朗普总统的信息对其进行了篡改。陆军随后修复了受损网站。

title: Solos debuts an even lighter version of its camera-less smart glasses
summary: Solos announced the AirGo A6 smart glasses, weighing around 19 grams—half the weight of last year's A5 model—and featuring voice-controlled AI without cameras. The lighter design is achieved through thinner temple arms and improved internal engineering.
content:
The AirGo A6 are available in multiple designs including several transparent color options. | Image: Solos	

Solos announced a new version of its AirGo smart glasses, one that forgoes cameras for a sleeker design and an AI assistant that relies on voice interactions. Last year's AirGo A5 weighed 36 to 40 grams depending on the frame style, but the new AirGo A6 weigh around 19 grams. Part of the weight savings comes from thinner temple arms housing speakers, batteries, and other electronics. For comparison, the new Meta Glasses announced last month weigh around 54 to nearly 60 grams depending on the style.
Pricing and availability for the new AirGo A6 hasn't been finalized yet, but the smart glasses will support "full prescription lens compatibilit …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Solos推出更轻版本的无摄像头智能眼镜
zh.summary: Solos宣布推出AirGo A6智能眼镜，重约19克—是去年A5型号重量的一半—具有无摄像头的语音控制人工智能功能。更轻的设计通过更细的镜腿和改进的内部工程实现。

title: Google Search lets creators know more about their reach
summary: Google is introducing a "platform properties" feature in Google Search Console that allows creators to track how people discover their social media and YouTube content through search. The feature shows which search terms drive traffic and how audiences interact with posts.
content:
Google is going to give content creators and website owners a better idea of how people find their social media profiles and YouTube content through Search. With a new feature in the Google Search Console called "platform properties," Google says that you'll be able to "easily track which search terms lead people to your Instagram, TikTok, X and YouTube content on Search, and see exactly how your audience is interacting with your posts," according to a blog post.
The new feature continues Google's push to make Search more of a hub for everything creators and publishers do online. In June, Google started letting big creators and publishers c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌搜索帮助创作者了解内容覆盖范围
zh.summary: 谷歌在谷歌搜索控制台中推出了"平台属性"功能,允许创作者追踪人们如何通过搜索发现他们的社交媒体和YouTube内容。该功能显示哪些搜索词驱动流量以及受众如何与帖子互动。

title: iFixit has a new toolkit for fixing appliances, building furniture, and household repairs
summary: iFixit has launched the $34.95 Megalodon Driver Kit, a compact toolkit designed for household repairs and DIY projects rather than electronics. The kit features a new screwdriver with a Swivel Grip Cap designed as an improvement over traditional ratcheting drivers.
content:
iFixit is best known for its detailed gadget teardowns and toolkits designed to help you crack open and troubleshoot your own electronics. Today it announced a new toolkit that's instead tailored to household repairs or DIY projects like fixing appliances or assembling flat-packed furniture. iFixit describes its $34.95 Megalodon Driver Kit as a "compact kit for the modern home" and it includes a new screwdriver the company designed to be a better alternative to traditional ratcheting drivers.
The star of the show is the Megalodon driver featuring a bright blue end cap iFixit calls the Swivel Grip Cap. The screwdriver is able to spin freely  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: iFixit推出用于修理电器、组装家具和家庭维修的新工具包
zh.summary: iFixit推出了售价34.95美元的巨齿鲨螺丝刀套件,这是一个为家庭维修和DIY项目设计的紧凑工具包。该套件采用了新型螺丝刀,配有旋转握把盖,旨在改进传统的棘轮驱动程序。

title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
summary: Savi has raised $7 million in seed funding and is launching an app to help consumers identify and protect themselves from realistic AI scams, such as deepfake kidnapping ransom demands. The app will be available on iPhone and Android.
content: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.

zh.title: Savi应用旨在保护消费者免受逼真的AI诈骗,如绑匪勒索赎金
zh.summary: Savi融资700万美元的种子融资,正在推出一款应用程序,帮助消费者识别和保护自己免受逼真的AI诈骗,例如深度伪造绑架赎金要求。该应用将在iPhone和Android平台上提供。

title: Marshall upgrades the bass and repairability of two wireless speakers
summary: Marshall announced new versions of the Acton IV and Stanmore IV Bluetooth speakers with upgraded tweeters, bass ports, and improved sound design. Both models emphasize repairability with replaceable components including knobs, feet, and front grills.
content:
The knobs and other parts on the Stanmore IV and Acton IV speakers are replaceable. | Image: Marshall	

Marshall announced new versions of its Acton and Stanmore Bluetooth speakers today with upgraded tweeters, bass ports, and internal designs that improve their ability to fill a room with sound. Both the Acton IV and Stanmore IV replace their four-year-old predecessors with a new focus on repairability. Parts including knobs, feet, and the speakers' front grills bearing the iconic Marshall logo are replaceable should they get damaged.
The smaller Acton IV, featuring a 4-inch woofer and a pair of 0.75-inch tweeters, is available starting today for $299.99 through Marshall's online store. The Stanmore IV, which has a similar driver setup but w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Marshall升级两款无线音箱的低音和可维修性
zh.summary: Marshall发布了Acton IV和Stanmore IV蓝牙音箱的新版本，配备改进的高音扬声器、低音端口和更好的音质设计。两款型号都强调可维修性，具有可更换的组件，包括旋钮、脚和前挡板。

title: Xbox’s bold plan for the future sounds nearly impossible
summary: Microsoft announced a major Xbox restructuring that CEO Asha Sharma described as "the most significant in Xbox history," though she also stated ambitions to entertain over a billion people daily. The layoffs reflect Xbox's ongoing struggles despite billions in investment.
content:
It's another bad week for the video game industry. Microsoft outlined a series of layoffs on Monday that Xbox CEO Asha Sharma described as "the most significant restructure in Xbox history." But buried in Sharma's memo was a curiously optimistic statement: "I want Xbox to be one of the few companies that entertains more than a billion people each day and gives everyone the opportunity to create and connect," she wrote. 
Xbox has been a shambling mess after Microsoft spent billions of dollars with little to show for it, and now it aims to reach a much bigger audience with a much smaller team, amid one of the most challenging times in the ind …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox未来的大胆计划听起来几乎不可能实现
zh.summary: 微软宣布进行重大Xbox重组，首席执行官Asha Sharma将其描述为"Xbox历史上最重要的"，尽管她也表示了娱乐10亿多人的雄心。裁员反映了Xbox尽管投入数十亿美元仍在持续的困境。

title: ULA's last six Atlas Vs can't launch anything besides Boeing's Starliner
summary: United Launch Alliance's remaining six Atlas V rockets are committed exclusively to launching Boeing's Starliner. Meanwhile, Amazon reports it has enough satellites in orbit to begin initial broadband service at mid-latitudes later this year.
content: Amazon says it has enough satellites in orbit to begin initial broadband service at mid-latitudes later this year.

zh.title: ULA最后的六枚Atlas V火箭只能发射波音Starliner
zh.summary: 联合发射联盟剩余的六枚Atlas V火箭专门用于发射波音Starliner。与此同时，亚马逊报告称其在轨卫星数量足以在今年晚些时候在中纬度地区开始初步宽带服务。

title: How AI could enable autonomous robot workers in workplaces—and maybe homes
summary: Top robotics researchers and founders discuss how AI is advancing robot autonomy for potential workplace and home applications. The analysis explores the technological developments enabling more independent robotic systems.
content: Top robotics researchers and founders explain how robot autonomy is evolving.

zh.title: 人工智能如何在工作场所实现自主机器人工人——甚至可能在家中
zh.summary: 顶级机器人研究人员和创始人讨论了人工智能如何推进机器人自主性，为工作场所和家庭应用带来潜力。该分析探讨了支撑更独立机器人系统的技术发展。

title: Are you ready for what it takes to stop ghost guns?
summary: The article examines efforts to regulate 3D-printed firearms, citing a case where a former Army National Guard member was arrested for allegedly manufacturing illegal machine gun conversion switches and firearm components. Federal prosecutors continue targeting the manufacturing and distribution of untraceable weapons.
content:
In the summer of 2024, former Army National Guard member Andrew Scott Hastings spent a sweaty afternoon carefully packing boxes with parts he made using his 3D printer. These weren't novelty figurines or replacement Ikea pieces. The boxes were instead filled with a handful of homemade firearm lower receivers and more than 100 "switches," small devices capable of converting a semiautomatic gun into a fully automatic weapon. Their intended recipients, federal prosecutors allege, were al-Qaida operatives.
Months later ATF agents busted two men in Colorado Springs for allegedly using 3D printers to churn out hundreds of illegal machine gun conv …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你准备好了吗：止住幽灵枪需要什么
zh.summary: 该文章审视了监管3D打印枪支的努力，引用了一位前陆军国民警卫队成员因涉嫌制造非法机关枪转换开关和枪支部件而被逮捕的案例。联邦检察官继续打击不可追踪武器的制造和销售。

title: Nothing’s first B-series phone is also skipping the US
summary: Nothing unveiled the Phone 4B, a budget-tier device that borrows design elements from the 4A line but uses plastic instead of metal construction. Following the brand's naming convention, the Phone 4B skips the US market, similar to previous budget Nothing devices.
content:
Nothing is shaking up the branding of its cheapest phones, following up last year's Phone 3A Lite with a new Phone 4B. Combining design elements of the 4A and 4A Pro, it follows Nothing's previous cheaper handsets in skipping the US market.
The company already uses the "A" branding to market its cheaper tier of products, and the first "B" phone sits another level below that. The 4B seemingly replaces the naming convention used for last year's Phone 3A Lite.
Design-wise, it borrows a little from the two 4A phones, which launched in March this year. The unibody look is similar to the 4A Pro, though now in plastic rather than metal, but it pa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Nothing首款B系列手机同样跳过美国市场
zh.summary: Nothing推出了Phone 4B，这是一款采用4A系列设计元素但使用塑料而非金属外壳的中端设备。遵循该品牌的命名惯例，Phone 4B跳过了美国市场，与之前的Nothing预算产品类似。

title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
summary: Forterra has deployed more than 100 American autonomous ground vehicles to Ukraine, marking the first large-scale deployment of U.S. military robots in active combat. This milestone demonstrates the growing role of autonomous systems in modern warfare and represents a significant step toward broader adoption of unmanned ground vehicles in conflict zones.
content: Forterra has deployed more than 100

zh.title: 第一批美国自主地面车辆在乌克兰参战
zh.summary: Forterra公司已向乌克兰部署了100多辆美国自主地面车辆，标志着美国军用机器人首次大规模部署在实际战斗中。这一里程碑事件展示了自主系统在现代战争中作用的日益增长，代表了无人地面车辆在冲突地区更广泛应用的重要一步。

title: Netflix invented binge-watching. Now it may have outgrown it.
summary: Netflix viewers increasingly aren't returning for subsequent seasons, undermining the platform's core competitive advantage of binge-ready content. The article examines how binge-watching as a viewing model may have lost strategic importance amid growing competition and shifting audience preferences.
content: A new report suggests Netflix viewers aren’t sticking around for Season 2. The bigger issue may be that binge-watching itself is no longer the advantage it once was.

zh.title: Netflix创造了追剧文化。现在它自己可能已经超越了这一模式
zh.summary: Netflix观众越来越少地回来追看后续季节，削弱了该平台的核心竞争优势——即时可追看的内容。该文章探讨了在日益激烈的竞争和观众偏好转变的背景下，追剧观看作为一种观看模式如何可能已经失去了战略重要性。
